author: y4rr
content:
Observation: InceptionV3 BEFORE state:
- 6 internal unit tests pass (test_inception_module_concat_channel_count, test_inception_v3_output_shape, etc.)
- Zero conformance tests exist for inception in conformance_vision_models.rs (confirmed by running cargo test --test conformance_vision_models -- inception = 0 tests)
- Param count for InceptionV3(1000): ~510,536 parameters (simplified 3-module arch: stem ~19K, 3x InceptionA ~234K, classifier ~257K)
- Input 299x299 works: stem_conv1 stride=2 -> 150x150, subsequent modules preserve spatial, AdaptiveAvgPool2d(1,1) -> 1x1 regardless of input size
- No source fixes needed; the architecture handles 299x299 correctly
